## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory interview with Dimitri Fernandes to explore his community-building experience.](https://fathom.video/share/ci-_vjQQWvHAJR7nszLSLoizDYrVjnH3?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Proven Community Builder:** Dimitri has a strong track record of launching and scaling communities, including Airbnb's Superhost program (surpassing goals) and WeWork's Brazil operations (achieving \>80% pre-launch occupancy).](https://fathom.video/share/ci-_vjQQWvHAJR7nszLSLoizDYrVjnH3?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [**Strategic Alignment:** His experience using community as a strategic asset—for pre-launch sales, member connections, and advocacy—directly matches growthx.ai's vision for AIledgrowth.com.](https://fathom.video/share/ci-_vjQQWvHAJR7nszLSLoizDYrVjnH3?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [**Founder Mindset:** As a founder (Afpass), Dimitri seeks a Series A environment offering autonomy and a chance to build, but with less personal risk than a startup.](https://fathom.video/share/ci-_vjQQWvHAJR7nszLSLoizDYrVjnH3?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
  - [**Next Step:** Marcel will provide context for a small assignment (Google Doc/Notion) for Dimitri to outline his thoughts on the AIledgrowth.com community.](https://fathom.video/share/ci-_vjQQWvHAJR7nszLSLoizDYrVjnH3?tab=summary&timestamp=3459.0)

## Topics

### growthx.ai's Community-First Strategy

  - [**Business Model:** Bootstrapped to $4M ARR before a Feb 2025 fundraise; on track for $15M ARR this year.](https://fathom.video/share/ci-_vjQQWvHAJR7nszLSLoizDYrVjnH3?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
  - [**AIledgrowth.com Vision:** A community-as-a-product designed to be a self-funding, net-neutral marketing and recruiting channel.](https://fathom.video/share/ci-_vjQQWvHAJR7nszLSLoizDYrVjnH3?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)
  - [**Financial Model:** A $150 sign-up fee covers member acquisition cost (CAC). Monthly revenue ($30/mo) is reinvested to fund growth, creating a compounding effect.](https://fathom.video/share/ci-_vjQQWvHAJR7nszLSLoizDYrVjnH3?tab=summary&timestamp=3150.0)
  - [**Current Status:** 68 paying members on Circle.so, acquired with minimal promotion, validating the model's potential.](https://fathom.video/share/ci-_vjQQWvHAJR7nszLSLoizDYrVjnH3?tab=summary&timestamp=2953.0)

### Dimitri's Experience: Airbnb Superhost Program

  - [**Mandate:** Launch the Superhost program in LatAm (primarily Brazil) to increase revenue via guest recurrency.](https://fathom.video/share/ci-_vjQQWvHAJR7nszLSLoizDYrVjnH3?tab=summary&timestamp=1131.0)
  - [**Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/ci-_vjQQWvHAJR7nszLSLoizDYrVjnH3?tab=summary&timestamp=1251.0)
      - [**Enablement:** Held weekly virtual and monthly in-person meetups to recruit high-potential hosts (identified by product data) and share best practices.](https://fathom.video/share/ci-_vjQQWvHAJR7nszLSLoizDYrVjnH3?tab=summary&timestamp=1266.0)
      - [**Scaling:** Created a Superhost ambassador program to train new hosts locally, leveraging the momentum of the 2014 World Cup and 2016 Olympics.](https://fathom.video/share/ci-_vjQQWvHAJR7nszLSLoizDYrVjnH3?tab=summary&timestamp=1514.0)
  - [**Key Accomplishment:** Grew the program to nearly 5,000 members in the first year, far exceeding the 2,000-member goal.](https://fathom.video/share/ci-_vjQQWvHAJR7nszLSLoizDYrVjnH3?tab=summary&timestamp=1684.0)

### Dimitri's Experience: WeWork Brazil Launch

  - [**Mandate:** Launch WeWork's Brazil operations and achieve \>75% occupancy for the first five buildings.](https://fathom.video/share/ci-_vjQQWvHAJR7nszLSLoizDYrVjnH3?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [**Challenge:** Sell space before the physical product existed.](https://fathom.video/share/ci-_vjQQWvHAJR7nszLSLoizDYrVjnH3?tab=summary&timestamp=1902.0)
  - [**Solution:** Built a pre-launch community around the "future of work" to generate excitement and leads.](https://fathom.video/share/ci-_vjQQWvHAJR7nszLSLoizDYrVjnH3?tab=summary&timestamp=1948.0)
      - [**Result:** Launched at \>80% occupancy.](https://fathom.video/share/ci-_vjQQWvHAJR7nszLSLoizDYrVjnH3?tab=summary&timestamp=2017.0)
  - [**Key Initiative: Curated Member Connections**](https://fathom.video/share/ci-_vjQQWvHAJR7nszLSLoizDYrVjnH3?tab=summary&timestamp=2063.0)
      - [**Goal:** Differentiate WeWork as a business-driven community, not just an office space.](https://fathom.video/share/ci-_vjQQWvHAJR7nszLSLoizDYrVjnH3?tab=summary&timestamp=2094.0)
      - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/ci-_vjQQWvHAJR7nszLSLoizDYrVjnH3?tab=summary&timestamp=2188.0)
        1.  [**Profiling:** Tracked all member companies in a spreadsheet by industry, size, and needs.](https://fathom.video/share/ci-_vjQQWvHAJR7nszLSLoizDYrVjnH3?tab=summary&timestamp=2188.0)
        2.  [**Discovery:** Held bi-weekly conversations with 5–10 members to understand their challenges.](https://fathom.video/share/ci-_vjQQWvHAJR7nszLSLoizDYrVjnH3?tab=summary&timestamp=2251.0)
        3.  [**Matching:** Made targeted introductions (e.g., VC to startup, service provider to HR lead).](https://fathom.video/share/ci-_vjQQWvHAJR7nszLSLoizDYrVjnH3?tab=summary&timestamp=2288.0)
        4.  [**Tracking:** Measured connection success via follow-up meetings and business generated.](https://fathom.video/share/ci-_vjQQWvHAJR7nszLSLoizDYrVjnH3?tab=summary&timestamp=2139.0)
  - [**Key Accomplishment:** Led the creation of WeWork's first NPS survey (in a Google Sheet) to measure member satisfaction. This process was later adopted company-wide.](https://fathom.video/share/ci-_vjQQWvHAJR7nszLSLoizDYrVjnH3?tab=summary&timestamp=2407.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Marcel:** Provide Dimitri with more context on the AIledgrowth.com community.](https://fathom.video/share/ci-_vjQQWvHAJR7nszLSLoizDYrVjnH3?tab=summary&timestamp=3459.0)
  - [**Marcel:** Assign a small project (Google Doc/Notion) for Dimitri to share his thoughts and ideas.](https://fathom.video/share/ci-_vjQQWvHAJR7nszLSLoizDYrVjnH3?tab=summary&timestamp=3459.0)
